title: capture-buffer.implicit_decision
description: T20:capture-buffer implicit_decision event (WS-321 Phase B). Pre-intention analog of /session-end's existing decision-detection (Step 5.4). Emitted when a 'let's do X' / 'we'll use Y' pattern is detected in notes or conversation. Feeds the ignition proposal's constraints/decisions list.

decision_text.description: The detected decision in plain language

source_path.description: File the decision was detected in (null if from conversation)

line_no.description: Line number in source file (null if from conversation)
